case_title: IN RE: IN RE THE PETITION OF UNICORN PROPERTIES LLC, A

docket_entries.description: ORDER REINSTATING PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER IN RE THE PETITION OF UNICORN PROPERTIES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT NONE

DECLARATION OF DOUG FEDERSPIEL IN SUPPORT OF VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER REINSTATING PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF IN RE THE PETITION OF UNICORN PROPERTIES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

DECLARATION OF MICHAEL S. WALKER IN OF VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER REINSTATING PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS FILED BY PETITIONER IN RE THE PETITION OF UNICORN PROPERTIES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR AN ORDER REINSTATING PETITIONERS TO ACTIVE STATUS;, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER IN RE THE PETITION OF UNICORN PROPERTIES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT REINSTATING PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS. IT IS ADJUDGED AND DECREED AS FOLLOWS: 1. PETITIONER UNICORN, PROPERTIES, LLC WAS NOT DISSOLVED AS THE RESULT OF THE CERTIFICATE OF CANCELLATION FILED ON OCTOBER 3, 2008. 2. THE FACTUAL REPRESENTATION SET FORTH IN THE CERTIFICATE OF CANCELLATION FILED OCTOBER 3, 2008 WERE MATERIALLY FALSE AND THE CERTIFICATE WAS NOT EXECUTED BY A MANAGER OR OTHER AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE OF PETITIONER. 3. PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTIONS 12260-12263, PETITIONER IS REINSTATED TO ACTIVE STATUS. 4. THE SECRETARY OF STATE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA IS AUTHORIZED AND DIRECTED TO FILE A CERTIFIED COPY OF THIS ORDER WITH THE RECORDS IT MAINTAINS FOR PETITIONER UNICORN PROPERTIES, LLC AND UPON SUCH FILING THE SECRETARY OF STATE SHALL REINSTATE PETITIONER TO ACTIVE STATUS ON ITS RECORDS EFFECTIVE AS OF THE DATE OF FILING. 5. THE SECRETARY OF STATE SHALL NOTIFY THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD OF THE REINSTATEMENT OF PETITIONER UNICORN PROPERTIES, LLC. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
